description: Phase 2 MVP — wire up ecosystem tools (qmd search, Obsidian Web Clipper, Marp slides, image handling, Dataview) to complete the core experience

userStories.title: Create search skill with qmd
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search my wiki with /search so I can find relevant pages faster than scanning the index, especially as the vault grows
acceptanceCriteria: Create .claude/skills/search/SKILL.md with proper frontmatter
Skill checks for qmd installation, lazy installs via brew or cargo if missing
Skill indexes vault wiki pages with qmd on first run
Skill queries qmd with the user's search terms and returns ranked results
Results show: page title, relevance snippet, page type, domain tags
Supports --vault flag to target specific vault
Documents how to set up qmd as an MCP server for native tool access
Falls back to grep-based search if qmd is not available
userStories.notes: qmd provides hybrid BM25/vector search. CLI and MCP server modes.

userStories.title: Create Obsidian Web Clipper workflow doc and ingest integration
userStories.description: As a user, I want a documented workflow for clipping web articles into my vault using Obsidian Web Clipper, then ingesting them
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/obsidian-web-clipper.md with step-by-step setup guide
Document Obsidian settings: attachment folder path -> raw/assets/
Document hotkey setup for downloading images locally
Document the full workflow: clip article -> download images -> /ingest raw/<article>.md --vault <name>
Include screenshots or descriptions of each Obsidian setting to change
Test that clipped articles in raw/ are ingestible by the /ingest skill
userStories.notes: Obsidian Web Clipper is a browser extension that converts web articles to markdown

userStories.title: Create slides skill with Marp
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate presentation slide decks from my wiki content with /slides so I can share knowledge visually
acceptanceCriteria: Create .claude/skills/slides/SKILL.md with proper frontmatter
Skill checks for @marp-team/marp-cli, lazy installs via pnpm if missing
Skill reads relevant wiki pages based on the topic argument
Generates a Marp-format markdown slide deck in the vault
Supports --vault flag and --topic argument
Generated slides use proper Marp frontmatter (theme, paginate, etc.)
Documents how to view slides in Obsidian via Marp plugin
Slide deck is saved to wiki/ and added to index.md
userStories.notes: Marp is a markdown-to-slides tool. Obsidian has a Marp plugin for viewing.

userStories.title: Add image handling to ingest pipeline
userStories.description: As a user, I want images referenced in sources to be downloaded locally during ingest so they don't break when URLs change
acceptanceCriteria: Update ingest-web skill to detect image URLs in extracted content
Download images to vault's raw/assets/ with descriptive filenames
Replace remote image URLs with local paths in the saved raw markdown
Wiki pages reference local images via relative paths
Handle common image formats: jpg, png, gif, svg, webp
Skip images that are already local paths
Note in source-note frontmatter how many images were downloaded
userStories.notes: Karpathy recommends downloading images locally so LLM can view them directly

userStories.title: Document and verify Dataview compatibility
userStories.description: As a user, I want to use Obsidian Dataview plugin to query my wiki pages by frontmatter so I can create dynamic views
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/dataview-queries.md with useful Dataview query examples
Verify all wiki-templates frontmatter fields are Dataview-queryable
Include queries for: all sources by date, entities by type, concepts by domain, pages missing sources, recently modified pages
Include a Dataview table query example that creates a dashboard view
Document which Obsidian Dataview settings to enable
Include a sample Dataview JS query for more complex views
userStories.notes: Dataview is an Obsidian plugin that runs queries over page frontmatter
